nl_query: What is the average number of annotations per frozen attempt?
failed_sql:
SELECT ea.id AS attempt_id, AVG(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ea_annotation.attempt_id = ea.id)) AS avg_annotations_per_freeze
FROM   evaluation_attempt ea
JOIN   evaluation_annotation ea_annotation ON ea_annotation.attempt_id = ea.id
WHERE  ea.status = 'FROZEN' AND ea.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY ea.id
error: Validation failed (safety): Non-SELECT statement detected by AST: Union. Only SELECT queries are permitted.
